entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
An elective in Life Science, Botany guides learners through the basic foundations of the discipline, while incorporating historical context, modern developments, current events, and citizenship. This course provides guidance and flexibility for teachers and learners to adjust the course for personal needs and preferences.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Science: Botany

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: There are no specific prerequisites or concurrents for this course.
